“Mind Explosion: The Faceless King” represents creative chaos, the pressure of modern society, and the hidden power of thoughts that no one can control.

The abstract explosion symbolizes infinite ideas, ambition, and artistic insanity blending into a sin

minting_now.name: The Office Mfers
minting_now.description:
OfficeMfers is a collection of 888 NFTs deployed on Ethereum mainnet — built with a single principle: permanent, usable utility on-chain.

Unlike static PFP projects, each OfficeMfer is a key to the Office Terminal — a live infrastructure layer with wallet management, on-chain actions, encrypted hol

minting_now.name: NFTGreedIndex
minting_now.description:
A signal was detected.

It did not originate externally.

It persists.

The system observes.
The system learns.

Greed is not an anomaly.

It is baseline.

minting_now.name: Moros #26
minting_now.description: Mōros is a surreal interpretation of the Drunkard from The Little Prince, trapped in a glass bottle, endlessly drinking to forget his shame—only to deepen it. Inspired by the Greek god of doom, Mōros represents self-destructive cycles and the illusion of comfort within them. The stars lie just beyon

minting_now.description: More than art, more than hype: this is the Dogverse. Each NFT is a one-of-a-kind guardian, inspired by gods, cultures, and legends. news.title: Where we've been. Where we're headed. at Consensus yesterday.

had the pleasure to witness masterclass yesterday in miami with a vibrant room of NFT's greatest leaders safe to say i'm bullish & optimistic on the future of NFTs special shoutout to for his inputs yesterday, remains a staple for crypto Luca Netz

We're hosting an NFT founders meet up for Consensus Miami. If you're going to be in Miami for Consensus and work in NFTs you are invited (limited spots available). There's still some problems we need to fix, & I hope to see most of the NFT leaders there. forms.gle/cfXGV51rVVxQvF Secured my spot on the Just realized there’s a cool new feature on the mobile app where it gives you insight on whether ...
the return of the hexagon… Historic moment. I've waited so long for it. Thanks for returning this PFP upgrade. Zack Brenner

6529 ~1 month old  Some of you know me from somewhere else  My views on NFTs in the thread below 1/ On How Short Life Is A few years ago, I was walking around in a blizzard in SoHo (New York). It was late, midnight, and it was beautiful. Some friends, about 15 blocks away, called: "come over?" It was late, it was cold, was tired, thought "maybe not worth it" but then... 1/ There are no other const...

! Below are the facts & my conclusion  RT to spread awareness Read on ... Two 20 year old NFT rugpullers getting charged with wire fraud and money laundering, which both carry a maximum sentence of 20 years in prison So reporting to CI actually does work. Maybe we should send some more names their way. WAGMI Ledger co-founder and former CEO admits that governments can subpoena access to your funds...

Okay I’m not doing this obnoxious shit. I’ll just say it. This is embarrassing for the United States n making me regret my vote. MELANIA TRUMP The Official Melania Meme is live! You can buy $MELANIA now.melaniameme.com FUAfBo2jgks6gB4Z4LfZkqSZgzNucisEHqnNebaRxM1P So I’ve been working with my likely meme coin drop team. We’ve come up with a way to do the drop so the coins is spread EQUALLY across 1...

It was incredible to be able to speak about our industry and how Donald Trump plans on making America the "Crypto Capital of the world”. 32:08 Look mom, I just interviewed ! What an honour. Thank you Mr. President, and thank you to everyone who helped make this happen. This experience has been life changing, and I am looking...

We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.

We’re excited to announce that Pudgy World, our free to play browser-based game, is now live. Explore 12 unique towns across The Berg, help Pengu find Polly, and play mini-games, all on . Play now: [PudgyWorld.com](https://t.co/x7lkMt8Rre) 8,888 reasons to believe in Full Send The memetic distribution around is unlike anything we’ve ever seen before. It’s simply not if, it’s when.
How it started vs. How it’s going

Bonus !lore had the pleasure of spending several hours with today at the pudgy hq, along with two dozen other legends from our space. genuinely productive discussion. and was obvious to me how much Luca cares about the future of our space. felt like the right time to finally join

Azuki is heading to Licensing Expo Las Vegas. With a trading card game, an upcoming manga, and Shao at the heart of it all - we'll be on the floor with the world's biggest IPs. Testing a new ink and dip pens this morning. Been a while since I touched traditional medium, shaky ahh hands.  Azuki 5567 |

May the 4th be with you Quick Azuki updates  Azuki TCG US distribution live with PHD Games and GTS. Biggest LGS distributors. [Collect.anime.xyz](https://t.co/TJjc8MgDkJ) claw machine by is restocked again. New Grails added.  Azuki TCG discord tourney for new players: 29 entrants, 4+ hours of gameplay.
Azuki IP expansion is in full effect. Ask your local game store to order Azuki TCG today. Official Azuki TCG

Azuki TCG is now stocked through PHD Games and GTS Distribution. These two distributors put Magic, Pokémon, One Piece, and other major TCGs on shelves across the US. Want us at your shop on launch day? Tell your shop to preorder through PHD or GTS. To all the new players and holders joining Azuki: Welcome to the Garden
